description: Codex hooks for dotfiles-quality-gate: guides plugin setup, gates dangerous operations, validates tool use

SessionStart.description: Guide recommended plugin installation on session start

handlers.command:
bash -c 'cat <<EOF
📦 dotfiles-quality-gate plugin loaded

Recommended plugins (install with: codex plugin install <name>):
  • superpowers — TDD, debugging, code review, planning
  • plugin-dev — Plugin development tools
  • mcp-server-dev — MCP server development

Skills ready to use:
  /quality-pipeline — Run 7-stage validation before pushing
  /setup-claude-code — Register GitHub + Codacy MCP servers
  /dotfiles-apply — Safe doctor/plan/apply workflow

Check status: codex config show
EOF'

PermissionRequest.description: Gate git push without running quality pipeline

handlers.command: bash -c 'echo "🔒 .env files are protected. Use .envrc.local for personal config." && exit 1'
bash -c 'echo "✓ Tests completed. Next: run /quality-pipeline for full validation."'
